content: Illustrative MSCI-style issuer credit assessment for Onyx Capital Partners, dated 2025-11-03 on Q3 fundamentals as of 2025-09-30. A heavy sector overlay drives this assessment down to BBB-, four notches below the two anchor providers on the same fundamentals. This is the outlier view: reconciliation must flag how far it sits from the peer median and attribute the distance to the sector overlay rather than to leverage or coverage.
